title: helianthemum strictum var. racemosum
intro: Helianthemum strictum var. racemosum, also known as Rock Rose or Frostweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and boosting the immune system. Helianthemum strictum var. racemosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
